allow: PowerShell($ua = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"; $urls = @\(353,364,543\); foreach \($id in $urls\) { Write-Output "===== LAYER $id ====="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mdotgis.state.mi.us/arcgis/rest/services/Widget/NextGenPrFinderPub/FeatureServer/$id`?f=pjson" -UserAgent $ua -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output \("HTTP " + $r.StatusCode + " - bytes: " + $r.RawContentLength\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\rr_verify"; foreach \($id in @\(353,364,543\)\) { Write-Output ""; Write-Output "===== LAYER $id ====="; $j = Get-Content "$tmp\\layer_$id.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output \("name        : " + $j.name\); Write-Output \("type        : " + $j.type\); Write-Output \("displayField: " + $j.displayField\); Write-Output \("geometryType: " + $j.geometryType\); Write-Output \("wkid        : " + $j.extent.spatialReference.latestWkid + " \(latest\), " + $j.extent.spatialReference.wkid + " \(wkid\)"\); Write-Output "---- fields ----"; $j.fields | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("{0,-30} {1,-22} {2}" -f $_.name, $_.type, $_.alias\) } })
